teachingPoint: Saga state must be persisted via storeDocumentWithOCC BEFORE any step command is dispatched. If the orchestrator crashes after dispatch but before persist, restart replays the step — duplicate execution. versionPin:-1 ensures insert-if-not-exists for new sagas. SETNX step lock prevents duplicate dispatch on restart.
ironRules: storeDocumentWithOCC(sagaState, versionPin:-1) BEFORE any step command dispatch
SETNX step lock before each step dispatch — prevents duplicate on restart
OCC on ALL state transitions — no plain storeDocument
SagaFailed emitted with failedStep and reason on any step failure
codeSnippet: await this.db.storeDocument(SAGA_INDEX, {...sagaState, status:'IN_PROGRESS'}, sagaId); const lockKey = `saga-step:${sagaId}:${stepId}`; const locked = await this.db.searchDocuments(LOCK_INDEX, {lockKey}); if (locked.data?.length) return; await this.db.storeDocument(LOCK_INDEX, {lockKey}, lockKey); await this.queue.enqueue(stepCommand, stepPayload);
